name: [Bober Bros] The Hole
short_description: [Bober Bros] The Hole is a first-person horror game that explores the cracks in domestic life. Your neighbor’s drilling starts the nightmare, but the holes reveal dark secrets far deeper than any wall could hide. No cheap scares, only disturbing reality.
detailed_description:
KEY FEATURES:

  • 🍺 Daily Routine Disrupted: Relaxing with a beer, watching TV, and trying to unwind — until the noise from next door and mysterious holes in your walls make rest impossible.

  • ⏳ Short but Unsettling: Experience a thought-provoking and intense narrative in a 40-minute playthrough, ideal for players seeking a deep yet concise psychological horror experience.

  • 🕹 Retro PS2-Inspired Graphics: Relive the charm of early 2000s horror games with visuals designed to evoke the nostalgic aesthetic of the PS2 era.

  • 🌍 Unique Setting: Immerse yourself in a world deeply rooted in Interslavic culture, with all text and fully voiced dialogue presented in the Interslavic language, providing a rich and authentic experience.

  • 👁️ Atmospheric Horror: No cheap jumpscares here. The Hole creates tension through its oppressive atmosphere, psychological themes, and uncomfortable domestic horror, bringing real-world fears to the forefront.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian, Spanish - Spain
